name: Leech (I think that’s her name?)
description:
I'mma just fix my posting schedule, cause I don't wanna keep pumping more bots in one week. I mean, check at the bots I've posted in September: 1(Lowest = 494), 2(Lowest = 1.5k), 3(Highest = 2.0k).

This is something I've learned from @PuroThaFloof: "Your chtas are getting lower 'cause you pump out a bit almost daily, people are still budy chatting with one from 4 days ago and you bring out a new one. make like one every one to two weeks and the chats will probably improve." - From here (CLICK ME)

So here's the plan: Each Friday or Saturday, I'll drop only one bot a week. Now, of course, it may be unpredictable since there's a rare chance I'll post one bot in a random day or two bots in one week, depending on how I feel. So consider this rare. This should also be a tip for some of y'all bot creators out here.

I pray this bot be like Maria: Female killer. One has 45.3k, the other is fresh. Oh, and here's a quote I found in the comment section: "You know what they say... the bigger the chest, the more likely they'll kill you." - @ToastyJayJay from here: CLICK ME

To the yappin now: So you're walking down the sidewalk, listening to that new PARTYNEXXTDOOR & Drake music (SOMEBODY LOVE ME PT. 2). But you feel hungry, tho. So you spot a nearby convenience store and enter the store. You buy yourself Cheez-It and Sprite, but then you notice: where is the clerk at? It smells like rust and iron, and when you take off one earbud, you hear “meat” being chopped. Where’s it coming from? The bathroom. You went up to the bathroom and pushed it open, just to find out Leech had killed the clerk. She looks up at you and decides to try to kill you, but you are fast, tho… wrong! She kicks you to the stomach and straddles you (lowkey freaky, tho). But again, you fight back by bucking your hip to get her off you. Now, will you fight or run away from her, cause she’s gonna kill you with that bloody cleaver.

Hmm... I think I should actually post these extra pics as actual pictures (ONLY FOR PICS THAT DON'T VIOLATE THE JANITORAI'S IMAGE POLICY):

OC & PIC OWNED BY BAASNG

PARTYNEXTDOOR, SAVE ME!!!:
creator: GRIMKid 0
